methods.V forcePut(K key, V value): An alternate form of put that silently removes any existing entry with the value value before proceeding with the put(K, V) operation.
methods.BiMap inverse(): Returns the inverse view of this bimap, which maps each of this bimap's values to its associated key.
methods.V put(K key, V value): Insert a key-value pair into the bimap.
methods.void putAll(Map map): Insert all key-value pairs from the given map into the bimap.
methods.Set values(): Get a view of the values contained in the bimap.
